Name: Killjoy, the Crooked Blade
Functional Text:
You may attack any opposing hero.

Whenever you steal a Gold, **the crowd boos** you.

The first time the crowd boos you each turn, each hero with more {h} than you loses 1{h}.

Name: Zane, Broadly Beloved
Functional Text:
You may equip 2H swords as though they were 1H.

Whenever you win a wager, **the crowd cheers** you.

The first time the crowd cheers you each turn, each hero draws a card.
